title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 3
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about a birthday meal.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are we still meeting at the pizza restaurant for the birthday meal? I wrote it in my diary, but I left my phone at home this morning. || Boy: That was the original plan, but the restaurant cannot fit our group tonight. [1]We need to meet at the cafe by the river instead[/1]. || Girl: I am glad I asked. I would have gone to the wrong place and wondered where everyone was. || Boy: That is all right. I will arrive ten minutes early, so look for me near the entrance. Keep your phone on in case anything changes again.
items.question: Where are they going to eat?

options.C: At the cafe by the river

items.explanation: They are going to eat at the cafe by the river.

items.context: You hear two students talking about a walk in the hills.
items.audio_script: Boy: Have you packed for the walk in the hills yet? I put sunglasses in my bag because I thought that was what we needed. || Girl: That was on the first list, but heavy showers are expected during the afternoon. [2]Everyone needs to bring a waterproof jacket now[/2]. || Boy: I would have taken the wrong thing otherwise. I was about to leave my bag by the door and forget about it. || Girl: Do not worry; we are not leaving yet. Put it in now, and check the final message once more before we leave tomorrow morning.
items.question: What should the student take?
items.explanation: Students need to take a waterproof jacket.

items.context: You hear two friends deciding what to do this evening.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are we still watching a film at the cinema this evening? I told my sister I would be home later, so I need to know. || Boy: That was the idea, but your sister has offered us two free tickets. [3]We are going to see the school concert instead[/3]. || Girl: Fine by me. I nearly paid for the other activity online this morning. || Boy: Luckily you asked first. I will book our places this evening and send you the time. We can meet at the bus stop after lunch.
items.question: What are they going to do?
items.explanation: They choose to see the school concert.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about a tennis lesson.
items.audio_script: Boy: I need to write down the time for the tennis lesson on Sunday. Is it still at nine o'clock, like you said yesterday? || Girl: No, the coach must open the indoor courts first. [4]It starts at quarter past nine now[/4], although we should arrive ten minutes earlier. || Boy: I am glad I checked. I would have been waiting there at the wrong time. || Girl: I will send you a reminder later. Bring everything you need, because there will not be time to go home again before it begins.
items.question: What time does the tennis lesson start?
items.explanation: The tennis lesson starts at quarter past nine.

items.context: You hear two students discussing a laptop.
items.audio_script: Woman: How are you getting on with your laptop? I heard it was not working properly. || Man: I first thought the screen was damaged, and my brother wondered if some keys were missing. But he checked it carefully last night. [5]The charger cable has stopped working[/5]. || Woman: Can it be fixed before your presentation on Monday? || Man: It should be possible. We know what is wrong now, and the repair shop said it should be ready tomorrow afternoon. That is a relief because I need it this weekend.
items.question: What is wrong with the laptop?
items.explanation: The charger cable has stopped working.

items.context: You hear two friends travelling to the sports centre.
items.audio_script: Man: Are you still travelling to the sports centre by train? I could meet you when you arrive. || Woman: I planned to, but the station is closed for repairs. I considered going by bus, but the next one will arrive too late. [6]I am going by bicycle instead[/6]. || Man: That sounds sensible. What time will you get there? || Woman: Just before eleven, if everything is on time. I have already checked the timetable online, so it should be easy. I will message you when I leave, so you do not have to wait outside.
items.question: How will the speaker travel to the sports centre?
items.explanation: The speaker will cycle to the sports centre.

items.context: You hear two people choosing a present for a friend.
items.audio_script: Girl: Did you buy a book for Lily's birthday? I saw one in the shop window yesterday and thought it looked nice. || Boy: No. I looked at a book, and I nearly chose some earrings, but she has read that book already and does not wear jewellery. [7]I bought a cinema voucher in the end[/7]. || Girl: That sounds like a good choice. It sounds more useful, and I think it will be appreciated. || Boy: I hope so. I kept the receipt, just in case it needs changing after we give it.
items.question: What present did the speaker buy?
items.explanation: The speaker bought a cinema voucher.
